news.headline: Tesla intensifies incentives for Q4 vehicle deliveries, aiming for record sales.
news.summary: As the fourth quarter kicks off, Tesla is increasing incentives in a push for reaching record delivery numbers. The company is offering a new round of incentives to drive up vehicle deliveries. This strategy comes as Tesla aims to boost its performance with increased deliveries.

news.headline: RTX beats Q3 expectations, raises outlook while Lockheed Martin misses sales views and increases dividend. Defense earnings week begins.
news.summary: RTX raised its forecast following a strong performance in Q3. Lockheed Martin fell short of sales expectations but increased its dividend. These defense companies are showing resilience as their stocks stabilize. The week began with contrasting results for Lockheed Martin and RTX in the defense sector.

news.headline: ECB's Lagarde: The inflation target to be reached sometime in 2025.
ECB's President Lagarde: It is too soon to say when the price target will be met.

BEV market: 71% male owners, 74% male shoppers. Women less familiar with BEVs but research carries more weight. Dealerships can close gender gap. Men research online (71%), women prefer in-person experiences.
news.summary: A study by EVForward® by Escalent reveals that the battery electric vehicle (BEV) ownership, shopping, and awareness are mainly dominated by men, with 71% of owners and 74% of shoppers being male. Men are more likely to conduct extensive research during the purchasing process compared to women. Women start with lower familiarity of BEVs, with only 30% being familiar as opposed to 55% of men; however, their research holds more weight in their final purchase decisions. Men are more inclined towards online research, videos, forums, and vehicle-building tools, while women prefer in-person experiences like test drives. The research points to an opportunity for automakers and dealerships to bridge the gender confidence gap by providing clear, reliable information to women. Women report having worse dealership experiences than men. The study provides insights for BEV manufacturers to better cater to the needs of female shoppers.

6sense CEO Jason Zintak honored by Goldman Sachs as a top entrepreneur at summit, second time recognized.
news.summary: In San Francisco, the prominent B2B revenue generation platform, 6sense®, revealed that CEO Jason Zintak has been acknowledged by Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) as one of the Most Exceptional Entrepreneurs of 2024. This recognition was announced at the Builders and Innovators Summit in Healdsburg, California. Zintak, recognized for the second time by Goldman Sachs, stands out among leaders in various sectors. Known for effectively scaling businesses, he has established a solid reputation as a successful leader.

news.headline: Sysdig's report shows $100,000+ lost per day to AI resource jacking in the evolving cloud attack landscape.
news.summary: Sysdig, a prominent player in real-time cloud security, has unveiled the Sysdig Threat Research Team’s (TRT) “2024 Global Threat Year-in-Review.” This report is crafted from insights into actual adversarial operations and attack campaigns. It sheds light on the changing strategies of threat actors, notably their increasing use of automation and emerging cloud technologies. A significant disclosure from the report is the staggering amount of over $100,000 lost daily due to AI resource jacking. This trend showcases the escalating threat landscape and the dire consequences faced by organizations in terms of financial losses.

news.headline: Lenovo unveils Lenovo 360, offering tailored partner journeys for MSPs, GSIs, AI, Data Management, and Education sectors.
news.summary: Lenovo, a leading technology company, unveiled their Lenovo 360 Global Partner Framework with five specialized pathways to cater to different partner needs. These tailored journeys include Lenovo 360 for Managed Service Providers (MSPs), Lenovo 360 for Global Systems Integrators (GSIs), Lenovo 360 for AI, Lenovo 360 for Data Management, and Lenovo 360 for Education. These pathways offer customized routes for partners focusing on various industry segments and technology solutions. The announcement aims to provide specific support and resources for partners, highlighting the company's commitment to partner success.

news.headline: Rio2 increases previously announced overnight market public offering, revealing pricing and upsizing. #Rio2 #publicoffering
news.summary: In recent data released, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country had risen to 6.5%, an increase of 0.3% from the previous month. This amounts to approximately 10.4 million people without jobs. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter was revised downward to 2.1% as compared to the initial estimate of 2.5%. Inflation also saw a slight uptick, reaching 2.3% in the latest report. These economic indicators have raised concerns about the overall health of the economy and prompted calls for potential policy changes to address the challenges faced by both businesses and workers.

news.headline: OWIT Global enhances AI technology in insurance data management; focuses on Bordereaux and data transformation.
news.summary: A company based in West Hartford, Connecticut, OWIT Global (OWIT), known for its cloud-based insurance-specific microservices solutions, has revealed an advanced AI project aimed at enhancing its industry-leading solution. This initiative is focused on supporting Bordereaux Management, Statement of Values (SOVs), as well as other data migration and cleansing processes. OWIT has made significant investments in their no-code solutions tailored for the insurance sector, which have garnered successful traction in the industry.

news.headline: Independent Bank Corp declared 24 cents/share quarterly dividend on common stock, payable on Nov 15, to shareholders on record by Nov 5.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Grand Rapids-based Independent Bank Corporation disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of 24 cents per share for its common stock (NASDAQ: IBCP). This dividend will be disbursed on November 15, 2024, to shareholders holding positions as of November 5, 2024.

news.headline: Q2 Holdings partners with AWS to advance banking innovation for clients, including banks and credit unions.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Q2 Holdings Inc. (NYSE: QTWO) revealed an enhanced partnership with Amazon Web Services, Inc. (AWS), an arm of Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN). This collaboration aims to fuel innovation for Q2's financial services clients, including banks, credit unions, and fintech companies. As a premier consulting partner within AWS, Presidio will also play a key role in this initiative. The partnership signifies a strategic move to drive digital transformation within the financial sector, leveraging the expertise of all three companies.

news.headline: Payoneer (NASDAQ: PAYO) to reveal Q3 2024 financial results on November 5, before market opens.
news.summary: Payoneer, listed on NASDAQ as PAYO, is set to announce its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on Tuesday, November 5, 2024, prior to the opening of the market.

news.headline: Transfr and Chris Gardner launch 'Permission to Dream 2.0: Pathways to Success', offering career opportunities with immersive training.
news.summary: In New York, Transfr, Inc. has introduced the Permission to Dream 2.0: Pathways to Success program in collaboration with author and entrepreneur Chris Gardner. This initiative combines Gardner's motivational content with Transfr's VR career training, aiming to establish career paths and opportunities for wealth creation. The partnership seeks to empower individuals, especially those belonging to underrepresented communities, through immersive training experiences.

news.headline: Ascend Learning buys StaffGarden, a clinical talent platform used by 800+ hospitals. Acquisition in Burlington, Mass.
news.summary: Ascend Learning, a company based in Burlington, Massachusetts, has recently acquired StaffGarden, a cloud-based platform specializing in clinical talent development and compliance. This acquisition is significant as StaffGarden is trusted by more than 800 hospitals. The acquisition represents a strategic move by Ascend Learning to expand its presence in the healthcare industry and enhance its offerings in talent development and compliance solutions for clinical professionals.

news.headline: Agentech receives $3 million to transform insurance claims using AI-powered workforce, creating groundbreaking solutions.
news.summary: In New York, Agentech, a worldwide AI support team for insurance claims, has successfully obtained $3 million in funding to transform the insurance claims process through the utilization of AI technology.

news.headline: Sunoh.ai's AI solution helps Beaumont providers complete documentation same day, saving time - from Business Wire.
news.summary: eClinicalWorks, a leading ambulatory cloud EHR provider, recently revealed that Beaumont Internal Medicine & Geriatric Associates (BIMGA) has effectively implemented Sunoh.ai. This innovative AI scribe technology has enabled BIMGA to save valuable time on clinical documentation by efficiently transforming patient-provider discussions into relevant clinical records within the eClinicalWorks EHR system. Sunoh.ai assists providers in alleviating the burden of documentation, significantly streamlining the process for BIMGA.

news.headline: BoE’s Greene: The BoE pays attention to what's happening with the Fed's curve.
ECB's President Lagarde: I can't say we've defeated inflation yet. I hope inflation is back at target sooner than projected.
Wolters Kluwer to showcase innovation and AI at Amplify 2024 in Coronado, California from Oct 22-24 at Marriott Resort.
news.summary: In Houston, Wolters Kluwer's team is hosting Amplify 2024 in Coronado, California, inviting customers to join for the tenth anniversary of the conference. The event, from October 22 to 24 at the Coronado Island Marriott Resort, will feature solution training sessions, panel discussions with experts, and networking with industry leaders.

news.headline: Laserfiche 12 released, offering new features and innovations for self-hosted customers. General availability set for Nov. 6, 2024.
news.summary: In Long Beach, California, Laserfiche, the top SaaS provider of intelligent content management and business process automation, has introduced Laserfiche 12, the newest version of its software. This release, set for general availability on Nov. 6, 2024, delivers a wealth of innovations and new features for self-hosted customers. Laserfiche 12 marks a significant shift in user experience by introducing customer-centric enhancements, making it a milestone in Laserfiche's history.

news.headline: Gen AI transforms finance with Digital World Class® organizations leading the way, says latest report by The Hackett Group.
news.summary: In Miami, the emergence of Generative artificial intelligence (Gen AI) is revolutionizing the finance sector, causing a disruption in conventional practices and expanding the realm of possibilities. With financial organizations under growing demands to boost creativity and reduce expenses, Digital World Class® entities have a distinctive advantage in utilizing Gen AI to predict future trends and unearth fresh avenues for rapid evolution. Recent studies by The Hackett Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: HCKT) shed light on this trend.

news.headline: Survey by New Ocean Health shows 74% have chronic conditions; top physical are high cholesterol (38%) and hypertension (34%); top mental are anxiety (56%) and depression (48%).
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by New Ocean Health in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania revealed that approximately 75% of respondents have been diagnosed with at least one chronic condition impacting their physical and mental well-being. The data pointed to high cholesterol affecting 38% and hypertension affecting 34% as the most common physical conditions among participants. Mental health issues were also prevalent, with anxiety reported by 56% of respondents and depression by 48%. The findings indicate a significant impact of chronic conditions on the overall health of individuals surveyed.

news.headline: PSA unboXed and Amperesand partner for trials on solid-state transformer tech at Singapore's port for sustainable electrification.
news.summary: In Singapore, PSA unboXed and Amperesand have teamed up for a trial aimed at advancing port decarbonization and sustainable logistics. The collaboration will involve testing Amperesand's solid-state transformer (SST) technology at a port in Singapore. This initiative is part of PSA's efforts to introduce charging facilities for its fleet, and marks a step towards greener practices in the industry. PSA International, through its innovation arm PSA unboXed, continues to lead in exploring new solutions, with a focus on sustainability and reducing carbon footprint.

news.headline: Enpro (NYSE: NPO) to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov. 5th at 6:30 am ET & hold conference call at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: A leading company, Enpro (NYSE: NPO), is scheduled to announce its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 in Charlotte, North Carolina. The announcement is set for November 5th at 6:30 am Eastern Time. Following this, there will be a conference call to discuss the company's performance at 8:30 am ET. Investors and stakeholders are eagerly anticipating these updates on the company's financial status and operations.

news.headline: ECB's Lagarde: Inflation numbers are relatively reassuring.
ECB's President Lagarde: Disinflation is on the right track.
ECB's President Lagarde: We can't jump to conclusion that it's a done deal.
Binance launches EURI Simple Earn promo with up to 7% APR. Earn Bonus Tiered APR and Real-Time APR rewards.
news.summary: A new promotion has been unveiled by Binance for Eurite (EURI) Simple Earn Flexible Products, providing users with an opportunity to earn up to 7% Annual Percentage Rate (APR). Subscribers of this promotion have the chance to receive Bonus Tiered APR and Real-Time APR rewards throughout the promotional timeframe.

news.headline: Study at Binance Academy and win $12,000 USDC for finishing the beginner track - get vouchers and NFTs.
news.summary: Binance Academy has introduced a fresh program that offers verified participants who finish its beginner track courses a portion of $12,000 in USDC token vouchers along with NFT certificates as rewards.

news.headline: Nagel rejects ECB's 'dot plot' as rate guidance, opts for Fed-style - Source reports.
Blushington forms National Advisory Board for franchise expansion, aims to award 130 franchises by 2028.
news.summary: In New York, Blushington, a luxury beauty franchise, has established a National Advisory Board to offer strategic direction and aid in their goal of granting 130 franchises by 2028. This initiative aims to make A-List beauty services more accessible to a broader audience. The board consists of renowned leaders in beauty, franchising, commercial real estate, product development, and human capital.

news.headline: Kaged, a leading supplement maker, returns to Bodybuilding.com, bringing science-backed products for healthier community.
news.summary: Kaged, a premier supplement brand, has returned to Bodybuilding.com with a range of products aimed at promoting health and fitness. This announcement coincides with several others leading up to a transformative year for BBCOM. Since 2015, Kaged has focused on creating science-backed supplements that prioritize wellness and strength for its users. Their products contain carefully researched ingredients in effective doses, catering to the needs of fitness enthusiasts. This comeback signifies Kaged's commitment to providing a comprehensive selection of sports nutrition items, including pre-workouts, to assist individuals in achieving their fitness goals.

news.headline: Valor PayTech partners with AWS for quicker, more reliable services, ensuring high uptime for 200,000+ devices.
news.summary: In JERICHO, N.Y., Valor PayTech, a prominent provider of processor-agnostic, omnichannel payment solutions, has completed its transition to Amazon Web Services (AWS). This move signifies a notable enhancement in speed, scalability, security, and system reliability for Valor. The transition guarantees that Valor’s expanding network, comprising over 200,000 connected devices and partners, witnesses top-tier performance and uptime in the payment sector. By leveraging AWS’s cloud infrastructure, Valor PayTech has upgraded its services significantly.

news.headline: PPG's New Paint for a New Start initiative enhances 27 schools worldwide with 1,600 volunteers dedicating 8,000 hours.
news.summary: Pittsburgh - Today, PPG (NYSE:PPG) revealed that in 2024, the third year of its New Paint for a New Start project, as a component of the COLORFUL COMMUNITIES® program, impacted 27 schools globally throughout June, July, and August. A notable involvement of over 1,600 PPG volunteers and community partners contributed approximately 8,000 hours to renovate classrooms and learning environments for more than 16,200 students and educators. Furthermore, PPG allocated over $1 million to aid the recipient schools.

news.headline: AwareID Plug-in for WordPress offers biometric authentication on WordPress Marketplace, benefiting diverse industries.
news.summary: A diverse array of industries have the opportunity to gain advantages from utilizing a top-tier, cloud-based biometric authentication solution. This innovative technology offers secure access to a variety of sectors, providing authentication through biometric data stored and processed in the cloud. With its cutting-edge features, this solution can revolutionize industries ranging from finance and healthcare to telecommunications and beyond. The incorporation of this advanced system has the potential to not only enhance security measures but also streamline processes for companies across different sectors. Overall, industries stand to greatly benefit from incorporating this industry-leading authentication solution into their operations.

news.headline: BoE’s Greene: It is surprising how tame energy prices have been.
CLEAResult to implement EV charging programs for AES Indiana, a groundbreaking portfolio in Austin.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, CLEAResult has been chosen by AES Indiana to introduce an innovative set of electric vehicle (EV) initiatives.

news.headline: Liberty Tire Recycling and Blessings in a Backpack raise $87,000 to end childhood hunger, through various events.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, Liberty Tire Recycling recently disclosed the outcomes from their extensive efforts to aid Blessings in a Backpack, generating $87,805 for the organization. Their initiatives encompassed a charity golf tournament, six packing events, and company-wide lunch-and-learns. Childhood food insecurity remains a pressing concern impacting around 13.4 million children nationwide. Despite existing meal programs for school-aged children during the week, Blessings in a Backpack aims to tackle this issue.

news.headline: Tractor Supply honors heroes with nationwide celebration Oct 26 - Nov 11. Recognizes military, veterans, and first responders. #HometownHeroes.
news.summary: Headquartered in Brentwood, Tennessee, Tractor Supply Company, the leading rural lifestyle retailer in the US, revealed a series of upcoming events in honor of Hometown Heroes. Scheduled from October 26 to November 11, the company will launch its inaugural Hometown Heroes Days across all Tractor Supply and Petsense stores countrywide. This initiative underscores the company's continuous dedication to recognizing and honoring the brave individuals who safeguard and serve our communities.

news.headline: Securian Financial partners with MASA to provide ambulance coverage in group accident insurance, setting new industry standard.
news.summary: Securian Financial, based in St. Paul, Minnesota, has partnered with MASA, a top emergency medical transportation benefit service, to provide exclusive ambulance coverage as an add-on to its group accident insurance product available nationwide. Unlike other insurers offering a fixed payout for ambulance services, Securian's collaboration with MASA ensures market-leading coverage for its policyholders. This partnership aims to enhance the benefits for policyholders in workplaces across the country.

news.headline: First Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: THFF) closes acquisition of SimplyBank, Dayton, TN impacting Q3 2024 results.
news.summary: In Terre Haute, Indiana, on October 22, 2024, First Financial Corporation (NASDAQ:THFF) shared its third quarter 2024 outcomes. The Corporation successfully concluded the acquisition of SimplyBank located in Dayton, Tennessee during this period. The quarter's financial performance was influenced by purchase accounting modifications and expenses, which are detailed in the disclosed results.

news.headline: BoE’s Greene: Inflation persistence data moving in right direction.
LCM, supported by Brookfield, targets €6B for private debt fund.
Fed's Harker does not comment on monetary policy or the economic outlook.
